items.title: Why B3 chose Android for secure AI-enabled productivity
items.content: Android and Samsung helped B3 securely scale mobile device management and AI capabilities for their management workforce.
items.contentSnippet: Android and Samsung helped B3 securely scale mobile device management and AI capabilities for their management workforce.

summaries.zh: B3选择Android系统，与三星合作，旨在安全地扩展移动设备管理及AI功能，以提升管理团队的生产力。此举确保了设备管理的安全性，并整合了AI技术，助力B3实现高效管理。
summaries.en: B3 selected Android to enhance secure AI-enabled productivity for its management workforce. Collaborating with Samsung, B3 scaled mobile device management while integrating AI capabilities, ensuring secure operations.

items.summary: B3选择Android系统，与三星合作，旨在安全地扩展移动设备管理及AI功能，以提升管理团队的生产力。此举确保了设备管理的安全性，并整合了AI技术，助力B3实现高效管理。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in June 2026
items.content: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from June 2026.
items.contentSnippet: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from June 2026.

summaries.zh: 2026年6月，谷歌发布了最新的人工智能更新。
summaries.en: Google announced its latest AI updates in June 2026. The updates include new features and improvements to existing AI tools. The company emphasized advancements in natural language processing and machine learning capabilities. These updates aim to enhance user experience and efficiency across various applications. Google also highlighted ongoing research in AI ethics and transparency. The updates reflect the company's commitment to innovation and responsible AI development. No specific details on the updates were provided beyond their general nature.

items.summary: 2026年6月，谷歌发布了最新的人工智能更新。

items.title: Maps has an authentic new voice in New Zealand
items.content: The new voice speaks English with a Kiwi accent while accurately pronouncing indigenous place names.
items.contentSnippet: The new voice speaks English with a Kiwi accent while accurately pronouncing indigenous place names.

summaries.zh: 谷歌地图在新西兰推出了新的语音功能，采用当地口音的英语进行导航，并能准确发音原住民地名。这一更新提升了地图的本土化体验，确保了语音提示的清晰度和准确性。
summaries.en: The article highlights Maps introducing a new voice for New Zealand, featuring a genuine Kiwi accent. This voice accurately pronounces indigenous place names, enhancing authenticity and user experience in the region.

items.summary: 谷歌地图在新西兰推出了新的语音功能，采用当地口音的英语进行导航，并能准确发音原住民地名。这一更新提升了地图的本土化体验，确保了语音提示的清晰度和准确性。

items.title: New York City educators and industry leaders gathered at Google’s offices to shape the future of AI in classrooms.
items.content: Google, the New York Jobs CEO Council and Urban Assembly hosted an AI summit for 150 education and industry leaders.
items.contentSnippet: Google, the New York Jobs CEO Council and Urban Assembly hosted an AI summit for 150 education and industry leaders.

summaries.zh: 谷歌、纽约就业CEO委员会和城市协会联合举办了一场人工智能峰会，150位教育及行业领袖齐聚谷歌办公室，共同探讨人工智能在课堂中的应用与发展。
summaries.en: A summit hosted by Google, the New York Jobs CEO Council, and Urban Assembly brought together 150 educators and industry leaders to discuss the future of AI in classrooms. The event took place at Google's offices.

items.summary: 谷歌、纽约就业CEO委员会和城市协会联合举办了一场人工智能峰会，150位教育及行业领袖齐聚谷歌办公室，共同探讨人工智能在课堂中的应用与发展。

items.title: Gemini Spark updates: macOS launch, connected apps and more
items.content: The latest Gemini Spark updates brings Spark to the macOS app, connects with your favorite apps and tracks topics in real time.
items.contentSnippet: The latest Gemini Spark updates brings Spark to the macOS app, connects with your favorite apps and tracks topics in real time.

summaries.zh: 最新Gemini Spark更新将Spark带到macOS应用，可与常用应用连接，并实时追踪主题。此次更新提升了跨平台兼容性和功能整合，使用户体验更便捷。
summaries.en: The latest Gemini Spark updates introduce macOS support, enable connections with favorite apps, and add real-time topic tracking functionality.

items.summary: 最新Gemini Spark更新将Spark带到macOS应用，可与常用应用连接，并实时追踪主题。此次更新提升了跨平台兼容性和功能整合，使用户体验更便捷。

items.title: Read our 11th annual Environmental Report
items.content: Today, we’re releasing our 11th Environmental Report, which provides a holistic view of our 2025 sustainability performance.
items.contentSnippet: Today, we’re releasing our 11th Environmental Report, which provides a holistic view of our 2025 sustainability performance.

summaries.zh: 我们发布了第11份环境报告，全面展示了2025年的可持续发展表现。
summaries.en: The company released its 11th Environmental Report, offering a comprehensive overview of its 2025 sustainability performance. The report aims to provide a holistic view of the organization's environmental efforts and achievements for the year.

items.summary: 我们发布了第11份环境报告，全面展示了2025年的可持续发展表现。

items.title: Start building with Nano Banana 2 Lite and Gemini Omni Flash
items.content: Scale your ideas with Nano Banana 2 Lite, our fastest, most cost-efficient Gemini Image model, and Gemini Omni Flash for high-quality video and conversational editing.
items.contentSnippet: Scale your ideas with Nano Banana 2 Lite, our fastest, most cost-efficient Gemini Image model, and Gemini Omni Flash for high-quality video and conversational editing.

summaries.zh: Nano Banana 2 Lite是Gemini Image系列中最快、最经济的模型，可用于扩展您的想法。同时，Gemini Omni Flash模型适用于高质量视频和对话编辑。
summaries.en: Nano Banana 2 Lite is the fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini Image model, designed for scaling ideas. Gemini Omni Flash offers high-quality video and conversational editing capabilities. Both tools are intended to enhance productivity and creativity in image and video projects.

items.summary: Nano Banana 2 Lite是Gemini Image系列中最快、最经济的模型，可用于扩展您的想法。同时，Gemini Omni Flash模型适用于高质量视频和对话编辑。

items.title: Unlocking Britain’s next era of productivity: Building a nation of AI trailblazers
items.content: Google UK shares its latest Economic Impact Report and how to enable more people to unlock the benefits of AI-powered technologies.
items.contentSnippet: Google UK shares its latest Economic Impact Report and how to enable more people to unlock the benefits of AI-powered technologies.

summaries.zh: 谷歌英国发布最新《经济影响报告》，探讨如何让更多人受益于AI技术，推动英国迈向生产力新阶段。报告强调培养AI先锋人才的重要性，旨在加速AI技术在各领域的应用，提升国家整体竞争力。
summaries.en: Google UK's Economic Impact Report highlights the potential of AI to boost productivity in Britain. The report emphasizes the need to empower more people to leverage AI-driven technologies. It aims to unlock a new era of productivity by fostering a nation of AI trailblazers. The focus is on enabling widespread access and adoption of AI to drive economic growth and innovation.

items.summary: 谷歌英国发布最新《经济影响报告》，探讨如何让更多人受益于AI技术，推动英国迈向生产力新阶段。报告强调培养AI先锋人才的重要性，旨在加速AI技术在各领域的应用，提升国家整体竞争力。

items.title: The Gemini app is bringing personalized image creation to more users.
items.content: Personal Intelligence makes the Gemini app feel tailored to you. With your permission, it pulls from Google tools like Gmail, Google Photos, YouTube and Search to provid…
items.contentSnippet: Personal Intelligence makes the Gemini app feel tailored to you. With your permission, it pulls from Google tools like Gmail, Google Photos, YouTube and Search to provid…

name: David Sharon
title: Group Product Manager, Multimodal Generation Lead

summaries.zh: 金智应用正将个性化图像创作功能带给更多用户。通过用户授权，该应用整合了谷歌工具（如Gmail、Google Photos、YouTube和Search）的数据，为用户提供定制化的图像创作体验。
summaries.en: The Gemini app introduces Personal Intelligence, offering personalized image creation for users. With permission, it accesses Google tools like Gmail, Photos, YouTube, and Search to tailor the experience. The feature enhances customization while ensuring user control over data usage.

items.summary: 金智应用正将个性化图像创作功能带给更多用户。通过用户授权，该应用整合了谷歌工具（如Gmail、Google Photos、YouTube和Search）的数据，为用户提供定制化的图像创作体验。

items.title: Ask an AI expert: What exactly is the full stack?
items.content: A Google expert explains what it means to take a full-stack approach to AI and why it’s been the foundation of our AI work for so long.
items.contentSnippet: A Google expert explains what it means to take a full-stack approach to AI and why it’s been the foundation of our AI work for so long.

summaries.zh: 谷歌专家解释了采用全栈方法进行人工智能的含义，并说明这是其人工智能工作的长期基础。全栈方法涉及从底层技术到上层应用的全面整合。
summaries.en: The article discusses the full-stack approach to AI, as explained by a Google expert. This approach involves comprehensive understanding and implementation across all layers of AI development. It has been a foundational element of Google's AI work for an extended period. The summary captures the expert's perspective on the significance of the full-stack method in AI.

items.summary: 谷歌专家解释了采用全栈方法进行人工智能的含义，并说明这是其人工智能工作的长期基础。全栈方法涉及从底层技术到上层应用的全面整合。

items.title: Gemini can now take notes in Google Meet for Google AI Pro and Ultra subscribers.
items.content: Google Meet's "Take notes for me" feature is available to Google AI Pro and Ultra subscribers in select languages.
items.contentSnippet: Google Meet's "Take notes for me" feature is available to Google AI Pro and Ultra subscribers in select languages.

summaries.zh: 谷歌Meet的“为我做笔记”功能现已向部分语言的Google AI Pro和Ultra订阅用户提供。该功能允许用户在会议中自动记录笔记，方便回顾和整理信息。
summaries.en: Google Meet now offers the "Take notes for me" feature to Google AI Pro and Ultra subscribers in select languages. This functionality allows users to have notes automatically generated during meetings. The feature is available to subscribers in supported regions.

items.summary: 谷歌Meet的“为我做笔记”功能现已向部分语言的Google AI Pro和Ultra订阅用户提供。该功能允许用户在会议中自动记录笔记，方便回顾和整理信息。

items.title: Unlock deeper insights for YouTube brand campaigns.
items.content: New features will help prove how YouTube brand campaigns are driving the results advertisers care about.
items.contentSnippet: New features will help prove how YouTube brand campaigns are driving the results advertisers care about.

summaries.zh: 新功能将助力证明YouTube品牌广告如何推动广告商关心的成果。
summaries.en: New YouTube features aim to demonstrate how brand campaigns generate results advertisers value. The updates provide tools to showcase performance and impact, enhancing campaign effectiveness for advertisers.

items.summary: 新功能将助力证明YouTube品牌广告如何推动广告商关心的成果。

items.title: Here's how Gemini can help you avoid jetlag.
items.content: If you’ve got a faraway trip coming up, the Gemini app can help you avoid jetlag so you can make the most of your visit.Once you’ve given Gemini permission to access you…
items.contentSnippet: If you’ve got a faraway trip coming up, the Gemini app can help you avoid jetlag so you can make the most of your visit.Once you’ve given Gemini permission to access you…

summaries.zh: Gemini应用可通过获取用户权限，帮助用户避免时差反应，从而更好地享受旅行。
summaries.en: The Gemini app helps users combat jetlag before faraway trips. It requires permission to access relevant data. The content briefly mentions its benefits but lacks specific details on how it achieves this. (50 words)

items.summary: Gemini应用可通过获取用户权限，帮助用户避免时差反应，从而更好地享受旅行。

items.title: Investing in Ukraine’s AI leadership and economic future
items.content: Google.org is providing a $5 million grant to scale Obrii, Ukraine’s national AI job platform. This contributes to Ukraine's AI adoption, following sustained investment …
items.contentSnippet: Google.org is providing a $5 million grant to scale Obrii, Ukraine’s national AI job platform. This contributes to Ukraine's AI adoption, following sustained investment …

name: Annette Kroeber-Riel
title: Vice President
department: Government Affairs and Public Policy for Europe

summaries.zh: 谷歌基金会向乌克兰国家AI就业平台Obrii提供500万美元资助，以扩大其规模。此举旨在推动乌克兰AI技术的应用，并持续投资于该国AI发展。
summaries.en: Google.org is granting $5 million to expand Obrii, Ukraine's national AI job platform, supporting AI adoption and economic recovery. The funding aims to enhance Ukraine's AI leadership and economic future.

items.summary: 谷歌基金会向乌克兰国家AI就业平台Obrii提供500万美元资助，以扩大其规模。此举旨在推动乌克兰AI技术的应用，并持续投资于该国AI发展。

items.title: Try these 3 Google AI tools to help find your next job.
items.content: Use Google AI tools — like Career Dreamer, NotebookLM and Gemini Live — for resumes, cover letters, interview prep and more.
items.contentSnippet: Use Google AI tools — like Career Dreamer, NotebookLM and Gemini Live — for resumes, cover letters, interview prep and more.

summaries.zh: 求职过程可能很繁琐。通过使用谷歌的三款AI工具，可以从头到尾简化求职流程。其中“Career Dreamer”是求职的第一步，用于寻找职业目标。这些工具旨在提高求职效率，帮助用户更顺利地找到理想工作。
summaries.en: The article recommends three Google AI tools to simplify job hunting. It begins by acknowledging the challenges of job searching and introduces tools like "Career Dreamer" to help users find suitable positions. The content emphasizes using AI to streamline the job search process from start to finish.

items.summary: 求职过程可能很繁琐。通过使用谷歌的三款AI工具，可以从头到尾简化求职流程。其中“Career Dreamer”是求职的第一步，用于寻找职业目标。这些工具旨在提高求职效率，帮助用户更顺利地找到理想工作。

items.title: 5 ways Google parents are using Gemini
items.content: How Gemini helps with homework, meal planning and more, so parents have time to focus on the good stuff.
items.contentSnippet: How Gemini helps with homework, meal planning and more, so parents have time to focus on the good stuff.

summaries.zh: 谷歌家长正使用Gemini完成作业、制定餐食等任务，以节省时间专注于更重要的事情。Gemini在家庭管理中发挥着重要作用。
summaries.en: Google's Gemini is being used by parents for various tasks, including homework assistance and meal planning, allowing them more time for other activities. The tool supports homework by providing explanations and solutions, while meal planning features help organize recipes and grocery lists. Gemini also aids in scheduling and managing family routines, further streamlining daily tasks. These functionalities enable parents to focus on quality family time.

items.summary: 谷歌家长正使用Gemini完成作业、制定餐食等任务，以节省时间专注于更重要的事情。Gemini在家庭管理中发挥着重要作用。

items.title: Building AI tailored for education, with educators in the lead
items.content: Google’s AI tools help educators support their teaching goals and provide personalized experiences to help students learn in the way that works best for them.
items.contentSnippet: Google’s AI tools help educators support their teaching goals and provide personalized experiences to help students learn in the way that works best for them.

summaries.zh: 谷歌的AI工具旨在辅助教育工作者实现教学目标，为学生提供个性化学习体验。这些工具帮助教师根据学生的需求定制教学内容，以最有效的方式促进学习。通过AI技术，教育工作者可以更高效地支持教学，提升学生的学习效果。
summaries.en: Google's AI tools assist educators in achieving teaching objectives and offer personalized learning experiences for students. The tools are designed to support educators in leading the development of AI tailored for education, ensuring it aligns with student needs and learning styles.

items.summary: 谷歌的AI工具旨在辅助教育工作者实现教学目标，为学生提供个性化学习体验。这些工具帮助教师根据学生的需求定制教学内容，以最有效的方式促进学习。通过AI技术，教育工作者可以更高效地支持教学，提升学生的学习效果。

items.title: Our latest Google Finance upgrades, including a new app
items.content: The new Google Finance is coming out of beta and launching a new Android app.
items.contentSnippet: The new Google Finance is coming out of beta and launching a new Android app.

summaries.zh: 谷歌金融最新升级版已结束测试，正式发布新安卓应用。此次更新包含新功能和改进，旨在提升用户体验。新应用将提供更便捷的财经信息获取方式，用户可通过官方渠道下载使用。
summaries.en: Google Finance is exiting beta and launching a new Android app as part of its latest upgrades. The update aims to improve user experience and functionality. The new app is now available for download, offering enhanced features and a more streamlined interface.

items.summary: 谷歌金融最新升级版已结束测试，正式发布新安卓应用。此次更新包含新功能和改进，旨在提升用户体验。新应用将提供更便捷的财经信息获取方式，用户可通过官方渠道下载使用。

items.title: How a Kentucky school district is scaling writing feedback with Gemini
items.content: Henry County Public Schools in Kentucky successfully closed critical achievement gaps with the help of Gemini for Education.
items.contentSnippet: Henry County Public Schools in Kentucky successfully closed critical achievement gaps with the help of Gemini for Education.

summaries.zh: 肯塔基州亨利县公立学校通过Gemini for Education成功缩小了关键学业差距。
summaries.en: Henry County Public Schools in Kentucky utilized Gemini for Education to close critical achievement gaps. The district scaled writing feedback effectively, improving student performance. The initiative demonstrated the tool's impact on educational outcomes.

items.summary: 肯塔基州亨利县公立学校通过Gemini for Education成功缩小了关键学业差距。

items.title: 5 ways to learn with study notebooks in the Gemini app
items.content: Study notebooks is a new space in the Gemini app that serves as an interactive learning tool tailored to any student's goals.
items.contentSnippet: Study notebooks is a new space in the Gemini app that serves as an interactive learning tool tailored to any student's goals.

summaries.zh:
《Gemini应用中的学习笔记功能：五种学习方法》

Gemini应用新增学习笔记功能，作为互动式学习工具，助力学生达成学习目标。该功能提供五种学习方法，帮助学生更高效地学习。
summaries.en: The Gemini app introduces "Study notebooks," a new interactive learning tool designed to help students achieve their educational goals. This feature provides a dedicated space for organizing and engaging with study materials.

items.summary:
《Gemini应用中的学习笔记功能：五种学习方法》

Gemini应用新增学习笔记功能，作为互动式学习工具，助力学生达成学习目标。该功能提供五种学习方法，帮助学生更高效地学习。
